description: Canonical risk classification registry for the construction-kernel family. Defines risk categories, severity levels, and assessment posture shared across all repos.

risk_categories.name: Water Intrusion
risk_categories.description: Risk of bulk water, capillary moisture, or condensation entering the building enclosure.

risk_categories.name: Air Leakage
risk_categories.description: Risk of uncontrolled air movement through the building enclosure.

risk_categories.name: Interstitial Condensation
risk_categories.description: Risk of condensation forming within the wall or roof assembly.

risk_categories.name: Thermal Bridging
risk_categories.description: Risk of localized heat loss or gain through thermally conductive elements.

risk_categories.name: Fire Propagation
risk_categories.description: Risk of fire spread through or along the building enclosure.

risk_categories.name: Material/Chemical Incompatibility
risk_categories.description: Risk of adverse reaction between adjacent materials or chemical systems.

risk_categories.name: Movement Accommodation Failure
risk_categories.description: Risk of cracking, debonding, or tearing due to inadequate movement accommodation.

risk_categories.name: Wind Uplift
risk_categories.description: Risk of component displacement or system failure under wind loads.

risk_categories.name: Installation Defect
risk_categories.description: Risk arising from improper installation practice or sequence.

risk_categories.name: Trade Miscoordination
risk_categories.description: Risk arising from incomplete or incorrect coordination between trades at scope boundaries.

risk_categories.name: Premature Degradation
risk_categories.description: Risk of material or system degradation before expected service life.

risk_categories.name: Warranty Voiding Condition
risk_categories.description: Risk of voiding manufacturer or system warranty due to non-compliant conditions.

severity_scale.critical: Life safety impact, structural damage, or immediate building closure risk.
severity_scale.high: Significant performance degradation, major repair cost, or warranty invalidation.
severity_scale.medium: Reduced performance, accelerated maintenance, or localized repair.

assessment_posture: Risk assessment is evidence-linked where possible. Unsubstantiated risk claims must be flagged with ambiguity_flag: true and confidence: low.
